title: Gorth (Trandoshan)

{{Quote|I do apologize. You can understand my desire to have some protection in a place like this. Gorth comes highly recommended.|Hath Monchar, to Lorn Pavan|<ref name="Shadow Hunter" />}}
'''Gorth''' was a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Gorth was hired by the [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] [[Hath Monchar]] to protect him while Monchar was trying to sell a [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] that contained plans for the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] to [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invade]] the planet [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. However, before Monchar could sell the holocron, Gorth, Monchar, and two [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] bodyguards were [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]], who tried to attain the device for his [[Palpatine/Legends|Master]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|I would not carry it around on my person in such places, even with Gorth as a protector.|Hath Monchar, to Lorn Pavan, speaking about the holocron|<ref name="Shadow Hunter" />}}
Gorth was a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who lived during the last [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="Shadow Hunter" /> In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> Gorth worked as a [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. During that year, the [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] [[Hath Monchar]] hired Gorth to protect him while trying to sell a [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] that contained information regarding the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] plans to [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|blockade]] the planet [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], and Monchar—the [[Deputy Viceroy]] of the Trade Federation—hoped to make a fortune by selling the information to the highest bidder. While the Neimoidian was waiting for a potential buyer, [[Lorn Pavan]], in the [[Dewback Inn]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]], Gorth stayed in the background, keeping an [[Eye/Legends|eye]] on Monchar and restraining Pavan after the [[Human/Legends|Human]] arrived at the bar to bargain.<ref name="Shadow Hunter" />

[[File:DarthMaul-DPback.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Gorth was killed by the Sith Lord Darth Maul.]]
Monchar and Pavan came to an agreement, and Gorth escorted Monchar back to the Neimoidian's [[Kaldani Spires Residential Apartments|apartment]], where the deal was to take place. Joined by two [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] bodyguards, Gorth and Monchar waited for Pavan to arrive with the [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|money]]. However, the group was then [[Skirmish on Coruscant (32 BBY)|attacked]] by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]], whose [[Palpatine/Legends|Master]] had tasked him with attaining the holocron. Gorth was the first to react after the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] had smashed through the door, and the Trandoshan opened fire with one of his [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]]. However, Maul simply reflected the blasterfire into Gorth's face with his [[Darth Maul's double-bladed lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], instantly [[Death/Legends|killing]] the Trandoshan. Maul proceeded to slay Monchar and the Quarren but was at first unable to collect the holocron due to the intervention of the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Mahwi Lihnn]], who was also looking for Monchar. The resulting fight ended in an explosion that destroyed much of the building and Gorth's body.<ref name="Shadow Hunter" />

==Personality and traits==
A big Trandoshan, Gorth obeyed Monchar's orders without question. Monchar, however, did not trust his bodyguard enough to carry the holocron with him in places such as the bar where Monchar met Pavan.<ref name="Shadow Hunter" />

==Skills and abilities==
{{Quote|<nowiki />''[…]'' it was obvious that he was an oaf, without skill or much training.|Darth Maul's observations on Gorth|<ref name="Shadow Hunter" />}}
Gorth was easily able to overpower and neutralize Pavan when the Human tried to approach Hath Monchar. The [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] hunter Mahwi Lihnn was instantly able to tell Gorth was a bodyguard from the way he behaved, and the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Maul believed Gorth to be an untrained amateur due to his quite obvious way of checking his surroundings for potential threats. Gorth was quick to react when Maul attacked, but that did not help the Trandoshan, as the Sith easily killed him.<ref name="Shadow Hunter" />

==Equipment==
Gorth was armed with two blasters and carried one on each hip.<ref name="Shadow Hunter" />

==Behind the scenes==
Gorth first appeared in ''[[Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter]]'', a novel written by [[Michael Reaves]] and published in [[2001]].<ref name="Shadow Hunter" />
